architecture.summary: SKILL.md in core plugin, 5-phase flow (Frame/Diverge/Evaluate/Deepen/Output), 3 depth modes, 5 cognitive lenses, subagent parallel dispatch in deep mode, state file for resumability

integrations.summary: Native handoff to sw:increment, persistent brainstorm docs in .specweave/docs/brainstorms/, state files in .specweave/state/, core PLUGIN.md update, docs PLUGIN.md deprecation, 3 .ts source files + CLAUDE.md template updates

ui-ux.summary: N/A - CLI skill with text-based output, no UI. DOT-notation process flow graph for visualization.

performance.summary: Token budgets per phase to control context usage. Quick mode (2 phases) vs standard (4 phases) vs deep (all 5 phases) for cost control.

security.summary: N/A - Internal skill, no auth, no PII, no external data. Runs within existing SpecWeave security context.

edge-cases.summary: Resumability via state file handles interrupted sessions. Depth mode selection handles varying time budgets. Auto-activation keywords for discoverability.
